title: Slovakian-Style Pilaf with Smoky Flavor
description: A Japanese-inspired pilaf with a smoky twist, featuring traditional Slovakian flavors.

ingredients.name: Slovakian pilaf mix
ingredients.notes: available at most international grocery stores

instructions: Heat sesame oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the Slovakian pilaf mix and cook according to package instructions, stirring frequently.
Add the marinated smoked tofu and stir to combine.
In a small bowl, whisk together miso paste, soy sauce, and a splash of water.
Pour the miso mixture over the pilaf and tofu, stirring to combine.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, allowing the flavors to meld.
Stir in green onions and serve hot.
Optional: garnish with additional green onions and a sprinkle of sesame seeds.
